Notice And Motion For Post Judgment Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Feb-23-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF FERGUSON ENTERPRISES, INC. Motion for Post Judgment Attorney Fees. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted. No opposition filed.(Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Jul-01-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Linda S. Forster, #13286.

Akelea Atkins, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Ferguson Enterprises, Inc., dba Air Cold Supply.
Christine Silva, Credit Manager for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Ragsdale's Heat & Air, Inc., Jerry Scott Ragsdale or Jodi Maria Ragsdale.
Amended Default entered against defendant on February 29, 2008.
Doe defendants were dismissed on February 29, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Ferguson Enterprises, Inc, dba Air Cold Supply, and against the Defaulted Defendants Ragsdale's Heat & Air, Inc., Jerry Scott Ragsdale and Jodi Maria Ragsdale as follows:

Damages/Principal - $24,936.83.
Prejudgment Interest - $1,220.84.
Attorney's Fees - $6,234.20.
Costs - $645.95, for a total of $33,037.82.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
